name: Mirvac Group
analysis: MGR's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 27% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.2× the 20-day average) — real participation. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$1.7570, stop A$1.6434, target A$2.0200 (2.32:1) — then trail it.
